json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Students must enroll in a studio class and at least one combo or ensemble each quarter.

options.title: Performance (24 units)
options.description: Complete 12 units from Global Jazz Studies 171A through 171I:

options.title: Studio Coursework
courses: Global Jazz Studies 171A through 171I

options.title: Small Jazz Combo
courses: GJ STDS 175 - Jazz Combo

options.title: Large Jazz Ensemble
courses: Global Jazz Studies 176A through 176G

options.title: Musicianship and Theory (24 units)
courses: GJ STDS 122A - Jazz Styles and Analysis: Early Jazz to Swing Era
GJ STDS 122B - Jazz Styles and Analysis: Bebop to Avant-garde
GJ STDS 122C - Jazz Styles and Analysis: Jazz since Sixties
GJ STDS 127A - Jazz Keyboard Harmony I
GJ STDS 127B - Jazz Keyboard Harmony II
GJ STDS 127C - Jazz Keyboard Harmony III
GJ STDS 129A - Jazz Theory and Improvisation I
GJ STDS 129B - Jazz Theory and Improvisation II
GJ STDS 129C - Jazz Theory and Improvisation III

options.title: Scholarly Foundations (20 units)
options.description: Select one course (at least 4 units) from:
courses: GJ STDS 101 - Cross-Cultural Perspectives in Jazz
GJ STDS 125 - Jazz Arranging and Orchestration

options.title: African American Studies
courses: AF AMER 108 - Jazz and Political Imagination
AF AMER M150D - Recent African American Urban History: Funk Music and Politics of Black Popular Culture
AF AMER M158C - Introduction to Afro-American History

options.title: Global Jazz Studies
courses: GJ STDS M109 - Women in Jazz
GJ STDS M119 - Cultural History of Rap
GJ STDS M130 - Culture of Jazz Aesthetics
GJ STDS M131 - Development of Latin Jazz
GJ STDS 165 - Selected Topics in Composition
GJ STDS 188 - Special Topics in Global Jazz Studies
GJ STDS 199 - Directed Research or Senior Project in Global Jazz Studies

options.title: Music Industry
courses: MSC IND 2 - Music Industry Fundamentals
MSC IND 104A - Music and Law
MSC IND 107A - Engineering and Production Fundamentals
MSC IND 115A - Art of Music Production I

options.title: Capstone Seminar and Project (4 units)
courses: GJ STDS 186A - Capstone Seminar
GJ STDS 186B - Capstone
